Living Forgotten Gallery

Air thickens with each breath.
Systems hostile to all clearance.
Surfaces show recent claw disturbances.

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Writings on the Wall

This wall is sealed. Nothing new can be saved.

  • East to other stairs
